description: WideWorldImporters daily sales ETL: extract Orders, OrderLines, Customers and Salespeople from SQL Server, apply enrichment transforms, write to TargetDB.

source.query: SELECT o.OrderID, o.CustomerID, o.SalespersonPersonID, o.OrderDate, o.ExpectedDeliveryDate, o.CustomerPurchaseOrderNumber, o.IsUndersupplyBackordered, o.Comments, o.LastEditedWhen FROM Sales.Orders o WHERE o.OrderDate >= DATEADD(day, -1, CAST('{{ ds }}' AS DATE)) AND o.OrderDate < CAST('{{ ds }}' AS DATE)

SELECT ol.OrderLineID, ol.OrderID, ol.StockItemID, ol.Description, ol.Quantity, ol.UnitPrice, ol.TaxRate, ol.PickedQuantity, ol.PickingCompletedWhen FROM Sales.OrderLines ol INNER JOIN Sales.Orders o ON ol.OrderID = o.OrderID WHERE o.OrderDate >= DATEADD(day, -1, CAST('{{ ds }}' AS DATE)) AND o.OrderDate < CAST('{{ ds }}' AS DATE)

SELECT c.CustomerID, c.CustomerName, c.BillToCustomerID, c.CreditLimit, c.AccountOpenedDate, c.StandardDiscountPercentage, c.IsStatementSent, c.IsOnCreditHold, c.PaymentDays, c.PhoneNumber, c.WebsiteURL FROM Sales.Customers c WHERE c.ValidTo = '9999-12-31 23:59:59.9999999'
SELECT p.PersonID, p.FullName AS SalespersonName, p.PreferredName, p.PhoneNumber, p.EmailAddress FROM Application.People p WHERE p.IsSalesperson = 1 AND p.ValidTo = '9999-12-31 23:59:59.9999999'

checks.description: Must have at least one order for the day

tasks.sql: SELECT o.OrderID, o.CustomerID, c.CustomerName, c.IsOnCreditHold, c.CreditLimit, c.StandardDiscountPercentage, o.SalespersonPersonID, sp.SalespersonName, o.OrderDate, o.ExpectedDeliveryDate, o.CustomerPurchaseOrderNumber, o.IsUndersupplyBackordered, o.Comments, DATEDIFF('day', o.OrderDate, o.ExpectedDeliveryDate) AS PromisedLeadDays, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS etl_loaded_at FROM extract_orders.raw_orders o LEFT JOIN extract_customers.raw_customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID LEFT JOIN extract_salespeople.raw_salespeople sp ON o.SalespersonPersonID = sp.PersonID

SELECT ol.OrderLineID, ol.OrderID, ol.StockItemID, ol.Description AS StockItemDescription, ol.Quantity, ol.UnitPrice, ol.TaxRate, ROUND(ol.Quantity * ol.UnitPrice, 2) AS LineTotal, ROUND(ol.Quantity * ol.UnitPrice * ol.TaxRate / 100.0, 2) AS TaxAmount, ROUND(ol.Quantity * ol.UnitPrice * (1 + ol.TaxRate / 100.0), 2) AS LineTotalIncTax, ol.PickedQuantity, ol.Quantity - ol.PickedQuantity AS OutstandingQty, CASE WHEN ol.PickedQuantity >= ol.Quantity THEN 'FULLY_PICKED' WHEN ol.PickedQuantity > 0 THEN 'PARTIALLY_PICKED' ELSE 'NOT_PICKED' END AS PickingStatus, ol.PickingCompletedWhen, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS etl_loaded_at FROM extract_order_lines.raw_order_lines ol

SELECT c.CustomerID, c.CustomerName, c.IsOnCreditHold, c.CreditLimit, DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(o.OrderDate AS TIMESTAMP)) AS OrderMonth, COUNT(DISTINCT o.OrderID) AS OrderCount, COUNT(ol.OrderLineID) AS TotalOrderLines, SUM(ol.Quantity) AS TotalUnits, ROUND(SUM(ol.Quantity * ol.UnitPrice), 2) AS TotalRevenue, ROUND(SUM(ol.Quantity * ol.UnitPrice * ol.TaxRate / 100.0), 2) AS TotalTax, ROUND(SUM(ol.Quantity * ol.UnitPrice * (1 + ol.TaxRate / 100.0)), 2) AS TotalRevIncTax, ROUND(AVG(ol.Quantity * ol.UnitPrice), 2) AS AvgLineValue, COUNT(DISTINCT ol.StockItemID) AS UniqueItemsBought, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS etl_loaded_at FROM extract_customers.raw_customers c INNER JOIN extract_orders.raw_orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID INNER JOIN extract_order_lines.raw_order_lines ol ON o.OrderID = ol.OrderID GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.CustomerName, c.IsOnCreditHold, c.CreditLimit, DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(o.OrderDate AS TIMESTAMP))

tasks.message: wwi_sales_etl completed for {{ ds }} — OrderEnriched, OrderLineDetail, CustomerMonthlySales updated.
